problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: Combining Quantum annealing for optimization problems with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
